description.value: **Benefit:** You must declare that you are using this feat before you make a combat maneuver check to maintain a grapple (thus a failed check to maintain the grapple ruins the attempt). If you maintain a grapple for a number of consecutive rounds equal to your opponentâs Constitution bonus (minimum 1 round), you can attempt to knock out your opponent. The victim must succeed at a Fortitude save (DC 10 + 1/2 your character level + your Str modifier) or else it falls unconscious for 1d4 rounds. Each successive round you attempt this, the target takes a cumulative â1 penalty on its saving throw. When you use this feat, you take an additional â2 penalty to your AC. Creatures that are immune to bleed damage, stunning, or critical hits are immune to this ability.
